plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development pipeline: 16 atomic Socratic skills (survey → spec → design → data-model → api → tasks → tests → implement → review → ship) + a living Now/Next/Later roadmap above the per-feature flow + 9 subagents, plus a TDD implementation engine with agent-team and dynamic-workflow modes. The Q&A skills are depth-tunable (easy/medium/hard); the ideation analyses (researcher/strategist/analyst/devil's-advocate) run as named subagents gated by that dial; diagrams are confirmed in prose; and every acceptance criterion is covered end-to-end.
